acts.summary: Authorizes tax credits for investors who make equity capital investments in registered venture capital corporations and eligible small business corporations in B.C. Current to October 8, 2024.

sections.title: Venture Capital Corporation Tax Credits
sections.description: Registration of venture capital corporations, investment requirements, and the tax credit or grant available to investors.

services.name: Get a tax credit for investing in a small business
services.ms_name: Access capital and financing for your business

acts.summary: Governs registration of employee share ownership plans and venture capital plans, and the tax credits available for employee investment in B.C. businesses. Current to October 8, 2024.

sections.title: Registration and tax credits for employee share ownership plans
sections.description: Sets out requirements for registering an employee share ownership plan and the tax credit available to participating employees.

services.name: Set up an employee share ownership plan
services.ms_name: Access capital and financing for your business
